title: ARIA CAM Setup Sheet
description: Schema for setup_sheet.json written by aria_os/cam_setup.py. All linear dimensions are millimetres; times are minutes.

schema_version.description: Schema version; must be '1.0' for this contract.

part_id.description: Slug identifier for the part (stem of the STEP filename).

machine_name.description: CNC machine name used for cycle-time and spindle-power calculations (e.g. 'Tormach 1100', 'HAAS VF2').

tools.description: Ordered list of cutting tools used in the CAM program.

max_doc_mm.description: Maximum recommended axial depth of cut, mm.

sfm.description: Surface feet per minute rating for this tool.

stock_dims.description: Raw stock block dimensions (part bbox + machining allowance), mm.

x_mm.description: Stock X dimension (part width + 6 mm allowance), mm.

y_mm.description: Stock Y dimension (part depth + 6 mm allowance), mm.

z_mm.description: Stock Z dimension (part height + 4 mm allowance), mm.

cycle_time_min_estimate.description: Estimated machining cycle time, minutes. Computed from MRR and stock removal volume; zero if unknown.

second_op_required.description: True if a flip/second setup is needed to machine bottom features.

work_offset_recommendation.description: Human-readable G-code work offset instruction (e.g. 'G54: bottom-left-top corner of stock').

generated_at.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp when this file was generated.
